data.title: Arista Networks Q4 Earnings: Revenue Beat, EPS Beat, Strong Guidance And More
data.description: Arista Networks reported fourth-quarter revenue of $1.93 billion, beating analyst estimates of $1.9 billion. The networking equipment company reported fourth-quarter adjusted earnings of 65 cents per share, beating analyst estimates of 57 cents per share, according to Benzinga Pro.

data.title: Arcus Biosciences Shares Are Down Today: What's Going On?
data.description: Arcus Biosciences Inc. (NYSE: RCUS) shares are trading lower Tuesday after the company announced a $150 million common stock offering.
